title: Vietnamese Chicken Stir Fry
description: Quick and flavorful stir fry made with Vietnamese-inspired ingredients and chicken breast. Serve over rice for a complete meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tsp of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove chicken from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add 2 tbsp of all-purpose flour and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add 1 cup of stir-fry sauce to the skillet, whisking continuously.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until thickened.
Add chicken back to the skillet and stir to coat with sauce.
Add 8 oz of Vietnamese rice noodles to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until noodles are heated through.
Stir in 2 tbsp of crunchy peanut butter and cook for 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with sliced green onions and chopped fresh cilantro.
